description: Analyze the 8-week workout log to determine when weights should be increased based on progressive overload principles. Calculate the necessary weight increases and highlight the instances where these adjustments are required within the spreadsheet.

natural_language.prompt: You have 8 weeks of workout data tracking exercises, weights, and reps. Create formulas to identify which exercises are ready for weight increases based on the 3x5 rule (3 successful sessions at current weight). Add conditional formatting to highlight exercises ready for progression.
